star_1.text: Okay so, Tiktok crashed a day ago while I was uploading a video, and now it won't work at all. Home page has the bottom and top screen, but no video loads. Friend page is the same, plus the small square of the uploading video, stuck at 0%. The button to make a video works, but presumably you can't upload a video. I, forgetting Tiktok was down, made a video and did I believe successfully save it to drafts. The notifications number shows up, and the page loads but appears blank. MORE ISSUES ASWELL

No one asked for an Ai; no one has the ability to turn it off. No one asked for it to give away my location; no way in app to turn it off. Luckly in my android settings I can do it there for the location but it keeps feeding me more and more accurate "local" feeds when the app 'glitches' me to the page. Give me my old tiktok app back or I'll just leave; done with it all at this point.

I am so sick of TT getting stuck on a video and despite moving onto another video and closing the app the sound continues to play! I can close the app and lock my phone and the sound will continue to play. If I reopen the app new videos will be playing but the sound continues to play overlapped. Also, the "more" button in the comments is in a terrible location as well as the "find similar". Please fix these issues.

Waste of an App. Account made over a month ago and still cannot follow accounts or like any content. The algorithm is supposed to be good, especially for small businesses and streamers, but it's not possible to use. I've tried multiple different things including clearing cache and storage, logging out and in, deleting the app, signing in on another device etc. Nothing works. Never had an issue like this with any other app.

Perfect until I could no longer follow people. Have used this app for years and loved it - then one day I just couldn't follow any accounts at all. Tried everything recommended but nothing worked - send 2 tickets to the support team but never heard anything back and it's been months. Tried to make a brand new account and the issue was still happening! On a brand new account. No one is getting back to me, still can't follow anyone so really disappointed with the service.

This app has become borderline unusable over the last week. Constant freezing in videos, constant freezing between videos, insane lag on everything, and I am now always getting "this app isn't responding, close or wait" errors, and if you click "wait" the error comes back one second later. Idk what's going on but it keeps getting worse every single day.

They should have the option to block certain sounds because no matter how many times I click that I'm not interested in videos with the sound, I still get videos with the same sound constantly. It's incredibly frustrating. If I hear Anxiety by Doechii again, after clicking not interested on the sound for the 30th time, I'm gonna crash out.

Keeps making me follow random people. I only followed about 60 or so accounts but every time I open the app there are an additional 100-200 people I never followed and have never seen before. Absolutely ridiculous. Truly stupid if you think that is a good feature to have on an algorithm-based app. Do not download this because it will only frustrate you.

App is super buggy right now. Constantly locks up while scrolling, and then keeps looping audio even after you kill the app. Sometimes it'll even start playing the audio again after it's stopped and you've closed the app. Get the, 'this app is taking a long time' prompt often. Borderline unusable. No one is going to have to ban TT is this keeps up, because it actively punishes you for watching.

So many issues with this app. Videos won't load, making me force close the app. Once I reopen it works again for awhile. Also I'll switch videos or even foce close the app and it will continue playing the noise from the video. Have had to restart phone to stop. It's not a network or Internet issue, full wifi or cell signal and it still does these things.

I don't know what is happening but TikTok will not let me like anything. Every time I try liking a video or a post, it takes my like away and tells me "You're tapping too fast. Take a break!" And I've been off my phone for hours and it will say that. I've tried everything from deleting and reinstalling, to clearing cache but nothing is working.

Please have the option to block ourselves from accidentally sharing videos to others when we hold down on a video!!!!! The privacy settings have changed, blocking direct messages in the privacy settings is now gone as of June, and I can no longer prevent accidentally sharing tiktoks from happening. Had a few months of not doing this until June update. Awful feature.

app has become extremely laggy all of a sudden. the side menu for like, comment share etc doesn't show most of the time. and if it does show it doesn't work - pressing the buttons does nothing. no liking, no commenting. if I delete cache, uninstall, restart and reinstall Tiktok it works perfectly for the first use. but any time I reopen it after that it goes back to being weird.

MOST INFURIATING APP! It randomly started wanting me to verify my e-mail (no e-mails have shown up) and won't let me use the app until I do...I tried using my phone number, but it says that number is already in use. It's MY freaking number! I was using an account for crafting and made a second one to do history stuff...deleted that account hoping it would help and it only did for a minute. WORST APP EVER! DO NOT USE!

I'm having a similar issue then other users where videos and live streams glitch and lag. It's actually frustrating and then to get inundated with ads of TikTok shop products and apps for minute long storys that you end up having to spend money to continue. I sometimes get repeat ads as well and no matter how much I report that it's repetitive or not relevant I still end up getting the ad again.

There's serious issues since this last update. So far, there is no resolution. The comment filter page comes up blank as well as the support page. The only way I can get into it is uninstalling and reinstalling the app. It's a 1 time deal, too! I literally have to do this every time to see the pages. Then they vanish again. I have to repeat this every time. It's really annoying that it's not being addressed. In addition, the activity page is totally blank as well.

Don't know if it's just me but every time I open the app it crashes now! I can't even watch the first video that pops up, I get halfway, and then it kicks me out!!! I've tried fixing it, thinking that maybe it's my phone and storage, but the more reviews I see, the more I've realized that it's just the app in general! It's working horribly! Hoping y'all fix this, but I don't even know if y'all check y'alls reviews at all. If you do, please fix this! It used to be a really cool app to use.

More and more, this app has just become filled with hate-speech of all kinds. Racism, trans phobia, homophobia, ableism, etc. There's absolutely no moderation or control, and it's an embarrassment to any modern social media. I've seen people inciting violence, spreading misinformation, using slurs, attacking cultures and ethnicities, and more. If there's no improvement, I can't imagine I'll be using this app much longer, and I couldn't recommend it to anyone.

worst customer service ever. trying to create an account but it doesn't recognize my email. It doesn't recognize because it's a .solutions domain. They just keep emailing me asking what my account is and they just say too many login attempts. I can't create the account to start with. I have now been through two people they just don't understand. update their response is perfectly explaining the issue. login to your account and select help. I can't make an account. read above

For an app this popular, you'd think it'd be atleast decent. Tiktok has been unfathomably buggy and laggy recently. On top of that, it shows more ads than actual VIDEOS. The video-to-ad ratio is like 1-3, which is actually RIDICULOUS. Plus, there are some settings that just don't exist?? There have been multiple instances where the video I was watching required captions, and when i went to turn them on in my settings, the option wasn't even there. Overall, almost unusable.

star_2.text: TikTok was great under the previous ownership! Hardly any ads, the accounts I followed actually showed up, no lag or strange "not connected" pop up, and didn't feel as intrusive as it does now. Would be great of we could opt out of alot of the privacy policy before saying agree to these terms. The connections with others were great and it was fun, definitely will miss it.

This app even after it's refreshed anymore doesn't even refresh when you click on it. It's glitching all the time especially after videos are being posted on story and on your actual page. They really need to get it together. You can uninstall and reinstall clear the cache and everything and nothing works most of the time. The glitching is getting to be ridiculous. constantly saying that you're not on Wi-Fi or a server when you are.

the app itself is okay, but the "You're adding favorites too fast!" Think is absolutely unbearable. It never lasts the same amount of time, and even when it goes away, it comes back after five or so videos. it'd be better just to remove the "feature" altogether because there is no reason that I'd have to wait 3 days just to add a favorite. the feedback doesn't help either because there is no way to get rid of it after you have it.

OK now you need to update this app.. It's glitchy, the fyp is broken, I can't chose my preferences, can't update my profile picture, my posts ain't going though, no music to work with and I can't clear my watch history.. Please update and fix this.. Being sold to oracle was a big mistake, ether go back to bite dance or youll be losing customer soon..

It WAS good, a fun time-waster, easy to use... However, it has become untrustworthy with the data it takes. I had tried multiple times to tell it "no," but it kept forcing me to agree to taking information for ads, etc. I had to go back and keep changing it. It also takes too much information from users IN GENERAL, now. For some, censorship has been an issue as well. Overall disappointed at the changes.

Trying to get into this app on another account is hell. Won't send me a code through my phone number, locked out for "too many attempts" on my first attempt for passwords even though I know it's correct and just changed it, wont let me set up a passkey on my account and just sends me in circles of "You don't have a passkey you have to set on up" when that's literally the prompt I chose. Collects incredibly personal data, in site search broken, and excessive ads/tiktok shop posts now

For the last 1-2 weeks, my FYP has been acting up, showing me videos in languages that I cannot understand (most often Russian, Arabic, and Spanish). I have done nothing to change my algorithm. It's gotten to be around 6 out of every 10 videos will be this way. Hitting "Not Interested" does nothing to help and Support has been a total joke and useless - even when I do everything they say to the letter. I don't mind videos in other languages, but not to the point where I can't watch anything.

Update Oct. 10: captions not working and unable to adjust clips. I've basically stopped posting bc this app is so awful to use. The entire point is to make/edit videos & you literally can not. As of today I am no longer able to edit or save changes in the app. It's insane. I have spent all morning trying to make a 90 second video. Cleared cache, restarted, etc etc this is incredibly frustrating.

the app itself is whatever- it's gone down a bit in quality with the fyp but the new AI bot (tiktok tako) is so unnecessary and annoying where I can't stand it. It's right where I put my thumb to scroll sometimes and I am constantly accidentally clicking on it, plus there's no way to get rid of it while you're watching videos. I don't see any use of the bot either, its just another way to add unneeded ai in the app. please just make an option to hide it at least on the front page.

for some reason while I'm watching videos in my "following," the app pulls down the stories/lives tab at the top. when i try to swipe the tab away, it will refresh my page. "following" always gets a glitch where no video plays, only sound, as well. stop trying to bully me into using the FYP, TikTok! I'm not interested!

Layout is confusing, TikTok shop is annoying and lags the entire app, and the content flagging system is ridiculous in DMs. I can't send hardly anything (even things like "Great video!") without it being flagged. Slideshows straight up don't load half of the time. Customer support is garbage. Editor is laggy. This app used to be decent, but it's really declined in the last few months.

good content, ridiculous interface. add a mute button. make the "more" caption option actually clickable. fast forward depends on a micro millimetre or you just end up with the menu in your face. as an epileptic, I do appreciate the "restrict flash content" option. only reason I'm adding an extra star to this review.

it's been around 2-3 years now that I'm using Tiktok (using vpn). I thought my Live option issue will be gone in a few days,but no. it hasn't. I cannot enjoy watching random lives which is pissing me off. I've tried reporting this issue but it hasn't been resolved. I do realise that using VPN and then using the app sometimes restricts some features,but that's awfully not true. It does work for some. I request the Team to look into this as I might not be the only one facing this issue.

Lag Lag Lag Bug Bug Bugsss. I'm a new-ish tiktok user and for the life of me I can't understand how it's so popular when the lag is SO BAD and the bugs are so frequent. I have to clear the cache at least once or twice a day for it to be usable. I get that "tiktok has stop responding" error message all the time. wtHeck

The app is good, the community is nice. It's just that there should be no reason that I should be "temporarily banned" from messaging for 6 months. I expected it to be a few weeks, not 6 months. I am still currently banned. And there's a bug that I hate, its basically when the app glitches and then an audio from a video repeats itself over and over again even when you scroll to another video it overlaps with that audio, And it keeps playing outside the app. Please fix your platform🙏

Here lately Tik tok has been showing videos I have already watched or lagging so badly that I have to completely shut it down. Sometimes even with the sound still playing meaning I have to shut the whole phone down just to get it to stop. Tried deleting unused apps and cleaning the cache, but none of that helped. Will be better when they fix the problems.

If 'appear on top' permission is enabled, tiktok will open at random intervals while you're using other apps, even if your phone is not being touched like if driving and using maps, or have music playing with your screen on. Definitely not what the permission is intended for and needs to be fixed. looking online people have been complaining about this for over a year.

it used to be good, but after the sale freezing videos have become ridiculously common, probably occurs every 3rd video. freezing happens on wifi and data, clearing cache doesn't help nor does exiting the app. Support is unhelpful as well. Additionally, there has been a clear change in the content that is pushed out and censoring of certain topics. At least this will cure my desire to use the app. to the bot that replied, you missed the sentence I specifically included that support is unhelpful

Since the us has bought the us part of TikTok it's been laggy, and there's been more issues, also theres no way to turn off the new ai bot which is awful, also the info they're collecting is weird and it just doesn't feel as safe or secure of an app as it used to be, I still use it and I still plan to for the most part but i might have to delete it in the future if it gets worse

Ever since the latest updates, the app functions even worse. Feels like everything is just turning into a store at this point. Ads before & after every other video & then attached to the end of videos. The ads at the end of videos tend to cut off the last few seconds of the original video as well, which I feel is unfair to the original poster. When you close the app the last video's audio continues to play, even if you close out of every app on your device. This is the only app it happens with.

star_3.text: TikTok has changed. The algorithm is LAME. I see way more ads in the feed now too. If you watch one video for half a second too long, all of a sudden there are a bunch of it in the feed, but I barely see the other stuff that I actually WANT to see. The changes are horrible. *** update as of 5/22. It got better for a short time, but now it sucks again. Ads ads ads ads ads blah blah blah. This is ridiculous. Get your algorithm straight.

I dont know if it's just me, but the app has been so laggy and glitchy for weeks now. Sometimes, it'll crash and exit me out, and other times, it'll just lag so much that I dont even wanna bother with it anymore. But today, it said there's a bug in the app, and to clear the cache, I have 0 cache on tiktok, and then they said it was a problem with the app itself..

I'm on a galaxy s24. For the past few weeks I'm not able to see activity from certain people. If my friend likes something I shared, reposts the same thing, or @'s me, I can't see any notifications in the app. Sometimes I'll still get a push notification, but if I follow it the in app notification isn't there. But I still see other notifications. Just not from them. I've tried uninstalling and reinstalling, clearing the cache. Nothing works. And the ai help is useless to help.

I swear, in the last few months, there is always some sort of bug or something wrong with the playback on the videos. They go dark sometimes, especially when i first open the app (I can hear audio but the screen is black). A lot more lately, I'll be scrolling for a little bit and all of a sudden, it struggles to load any videos, just constantly buffering, my internet and/or data is working perfectly fine.

The app is completely unusable. I can’t click on anything without getting an error message. I’m unable to post, getting zero views, and I can’t log out or switch accounts. Multiple users are reporting the same problems. Some have also said their balance/coins are missing or not showing at all. Following other users doesn’t work either. At this point, the app simply does not function.

i spend most of my time here but recently it's been so laggy. whenever I try to go back to the video I'm looking at, it will go back to the main page and it's kinda annoying. also the videos will freeze or just keep reloading when I didn't want them to. please also limit the ads, it's too many...also can you PLEASE make it where 13+ can use chats? I recently verified my age and it took my chats away, and I had so many streaks too. I hate that I have to wait until I'm 16 to use it again..

So I love the app and I have for a while. However the new interruption ads suck. i'm switching back to red box they interrupt every video and I hate interruptions more than anything, at least wait till the end of the video, and before it restarts play it. but no, every single one i've gotten has been directly in the center of the thing, and i've closed it every time i'm done with tiktok, if this does not get fixed.

It has shorts and live, so its streaming content. But it also has an entire shop. It seem like a market advertising its primary service as jesters and other hecklers in the street. Kind of like an online blog. I have had some errors where the audio from a previous tiktok will play over my next, even going as far as to still play even when I leave the app. Some tiktoks will also not load until I go back and swipe back into them. I am also displeased in the direction its going with advertising.

Getting worse by the day. Between the new ads that pop up every other video, the content changes and fake warnings about sharing well known information, half the time the app doesn't even function. I have to completely close the app over and over just to get the videos to load, the comment section is hit or miss for loading as well. And for whatever reason, you can't share some pages content, it shares as unavailable, and this includes news pages, the official pages for the Olympics/Paralympics.

Okay, it's TikTok. We all know this app. In my experience, I found better videos elsewhere, but that's personal preference. This app takes up way too much space. for reference, it took up the same amount of space as Instagram in a week. Instagram is larger on my phone because I've saved a LOT of stuff over time. I'd barely even used TikTok when it hit that amount of storage.

I have loved this app since 2018, and I truly appreciate how personalized the app can be, however, in the past few days, the app has been horrendous. It does not matter where I am, home, work, out in public, but the app always says "no internet connection", videos are extremely laggy, and comments and sounds of videos do not work consistently, either not showing up or saying that "it doesn't exist". Lastly, the search function no longer works, with only irrelevant videos showing up.

It's a fun app for the most part. It really brings people together all around the world even if it's silly trends that accomplishes that. I miss music.ly though... there were so many good memories on there. The transition onto tik tok deleted all of my old music.lys along with the beautiful memories that came with them, except for a select few that were the most recent. I liked being able to look back at everything and seeing how I grew, changed, and improved, but now I can't. They're all gone.

Links aren't working. When someone sends me something from TikTok via another platform like text or messenger, I can't get the video to play. It takes me to the download page but I ALREADY HAVE TIKTOK. Then when I click "open" from the download page, it takes me to a different video. Try again. Same thing. It's been ongoing for months, and I'm annoyed enough that I'm posting a review. Also, my husband who doesn't have TikTok also can't view videos I send him anymore. Same thing happens.

Fair warning, this app is insanely addictive. I've had to uninstall it like 5 times just to keep myself off. I've noticed the algorithm is getting worse lately, it used to show me a large variety of content from lots of creators that I really liked. Now, it shows me the same few topics from the same 10 creators, even when I go out of my way to search things, like, and comment on other stuff that I actually want to see. Nope, doesn't matter. Same 2 or 3 topics instead of the variety I'd like.

The app overall isn't bad. I'd say it's pretty good but, I remember logging in with my instagram account about a few months ago but now I can't log in because there's no instagram login option on the login page. I tried 20-30 minutes tying to get back into my account but there was just no button! Everything on my account, my hard work, followers, likes, saved Tik Tok are gone. I really don't get why they removed the instagram option for login, I still don't know if they fixed it or something.

So they did kind of fix the "Following" feed. However, now there is a "Friends" button instead of "Explore" and though I don't mind it I do miss the explore button. On another note, the little garden there is completely dishonest with water values. Not a big deal really, but when I see +150 water for visiting someone, I expect the entire 150, not 50 or 75 if they're feeling generous. I just think the numbers shown need to be the same as what you actually get.

Its cool and all. I made a couple vids with a friend and so far I enjoy the app. I do have one or complaints however. Very often when I'm scrolling through looking at vids, the audio will keep going and the video will just freeze frame and occasionally switch frames. That and when I make a duet some times its extremely laggy. I dont know if it's because of my phone, my wifi, or if its just the app. I'd like to at least know so i can fix it if possible.

I have had technical difficulties as of recently. My notifications weren't showing up so I closed the app and reopened it, that did not fix the problem. So I uninstalled the app and when I reinstalled and tried to log back in It said my account didn't exist... um what. So I tried to log in with my phone number and that's hooked to a separate mini account, and my email address isn't working so I can't reset my password. Im not very happy. I spent alot of time, energy, and money on this app.

I love tik tok, there's just a few problems though. I won't get certain notifications, like when people upload videos and when people follow me. that is not a big issue though I wish there was a recommend section for sounds. I can't find a lot of songs on it and it only shows 30 seconds. I'd appreciate it if we could have the whole song to choose from and more of a variety for sounds. Preferably, I'd want more vocaloid, but the recommend section is all I want. Please put into consideration.

i love this app and I use it all the time, but I recently undownloaded and downloaded it, and now I cannot sign back in. I've tried the phone number verification code, says im requesting too many and to come back later. I haven't done anything in atleast 30 days. and signing in with my email/username and password, the verification swipe puzzle isn't working, I've reported the problem and I still just cannot get into my account.

star_4.text: i think most of the problems of tiktok come from its community. but the app itself (for the most part) is really well-developed. i do notice bugs occasionally but it's not nearly as bad as other apps. the pushing of lives and shop items, however, is EXCESSIVE. i'll get 15 livestreams in a row, ads are like every 2 videos and there needs to be better moderation of deceptive advertising too.

As much as I like scrolling through the app, recently it's been horrible. Constant ads, weird and unsettling search suggestions, videos constantly in the wrong language, it's all over the place. I've also noticed that ever since Oracle took over, the audio of some videos is tangy and robotic. It's not the videos themselves, because some will sound normal, but when I scroll up to watch them again, they have the weird tang. Please fix it. Update: The tang is gone! Thanks for fixing it!

I cannot log into any of my old accounts even though I put in the same exact password. It still doesn't let me in the account. I tried multiple times to log in but couldn't because of a stupid glitch or bug. I used every method of logging in but it just keeps telling me that the password is wrong, even when I changed it. Fix this problem please, I need my accounts back.

The app that picked up where Vine left off, mostly anyways. I'm enjoying it a lot so far, super easy to use. Just one issue though: Can't edit videos after they have been posted. Like right after you hit submit you forgot something and you can't go back and change it(The description for example). It's unforgiving to mistakes.

Real people being real funny. App itself is pretty good, but could use a couple features. If they could combine the some of the web app features into this app also, it would be MUCH better. After 3 days, I did start seeing ads, but it's only every 4 or 5 videos maybe. It would be better if it was easier to tell the difference between ads & videos. (They are marked, but most times you're too busy giggling at the previous video to realize the next one's an ad. Just a bit more noticeable)

I'm digging the favorites menu, but I'd love for it to be a playlist situation, i.e. you can select to make it private, friends only, or public, so people can see what you're adding to each playlist, and it would be cool if I could add a video to more than one favorite folder. It also makes very little sense that you can only message people if they follow you and you follow them, just give us a chance to reject or accept the message like messenger does instead pls??

Look man, the app is great, but when I scroll and like, favorite, or whatever on the app for not even an hour, and I get the "you're tapping too fast, take a break" message pops up and persists for a full 24 hour day, come on man, that's ridiculous. Even more so when you get to know that I take breaks, several hours long each time to prevent this, and it still happens. Godsend though, the "you've been on a while, go outside" message has since stopped. Thank you. 🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏

This app has great content from creators, great place to share advise, knowledge, different walks of life, legal advice, relationship advice, etc. It's very easy to upload videos, but once uploaded it cant be edited or deleted. The desktop app doesn't allow you to leave comments. Another area of improvement, when marking post as "not interested" the same post and poster come back on my feed. For the most part, I like the app, it's very easy to spend a lot of time on it.

I've liked it a lot so far, but I got some weird audio syncing issues with one of the videos I was editing. Like I recorded something and the audio was delayed by at LEAST 3 seconds. I thought "No problem! I'll just cut the clip and reshoot it." But when I cut the clip, it cut the audio for the ENTIRE video. It was frustrating because now that tiktok is in Limbo because there's no way to troubleshoot IN the app. I wish it let us edit a bit more than the options you already have. Contact me Dev!

Well I enjoy the app and all of the funny creatures. But I've been noticing that the music doesnt always play when the video plays.. like the music will start but half way it stops.. but it fits the video.. I hope they fix that. However.. I have not had any problems with it.. I always watching videos from here.. even if they aren't a minute long. I am hoping that they might add a few more long times setting bc there's so many stories that people tell but only with 60 sec? More time sets plz.

Pretty straight forward. Would like more editing options. Also would like to have the choice to show the TikTok watermark or not. I have had people I know tell me that I don't show up in their feeds though, and they have to search to find my posts. That's a bummer. Sharing to other social media network is meh. I've found it's just easier to download the finished product and share it manually.

Like the app very much. The only problem I have with it , is it's storing a ton of temporary data on my phone, that I have to constantly clear out. Some things that I wish were improved, is the interface, I wish I could get rid of all the writing that covers the video while I watch it. Along with the option to select a sort of "genre" to load for videos for you specific tastes for the 'for you' page. Instead of it going by which videos you watch and react to.

I love this app but it would be super awesome if we could edit the name of a sound or other thing that we favorite (at least in our own view, so it doesn't take away the credit to the creator). Sometimes I save them to go back and make videos later and it's really hard to find the right one. It would also be cool if we could block certain people or tags from showing up because there's some parts of TikTok I just don't want to see when I scroll.

Love the app. Been here for years. Made a lot of friends. Tech support isn't helpful, and the appeal process sucks... it would be nice if we could transfer drafts between devices, or recover them if something happens to our phone. Also having issues with the volume turning down with every video... but there always seems to be glitches... it's like it's still in beta.

I was so excited to have the 10min video option to be able to have my singing videos up but then I waited too long and it is apparently gone again 😕. I had been waiting for my voice to recover from some things and when I was finally ready to do a video, the 10min option is gone. Could have used 3min option but so many songs are longer or I would've like to intro them etc. Other than that, no issues

Lately (the whole June), I was experiencing some glitches. For example, i'm searching for a video in the "search", watch different videos, and the audio is being taken from there and played multiple times, even if i exit the app and delete this fold. All I have to do is restart the phone at this point. It happened already 5 times. Please do something about it.

It's a very good app and most of it is perfect. But sometimes it logs you out of all your accounts and you need to log back in each one. And another thing is sometimes comment don't show up in your notifications. e.g someone replies to your comment but it doesn't appear in your notifications

Whenever I search something on the app, it completely shows me a different set of videos that have nothing to do with the topic I'm searching for. So overall, 3/5 for me. I don't know how tiktok does it but the algorithm it creates for me specifically is the best thing. Instagram sucks, I stopped using it back in 2020 when I started noticing a bunch of scamy things on there, and facebook also sucks. Both of these apps are very close minded only allowing you to see minimal content and it doesn't connect you to current events. While tiktok on the other hand updates almost immediately with current events all over the world. Such an amazing app.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Amazing app with huge potential TikTok is one of the best apps for connecting people and businesses. I really enjoy using it and the reach is amazing. One feature I would love to see added is a Marketplace section, similar to Facebook Marketplace, where users can buy and sell cars, products, and other items directly inside the app. Many businesses already use TikTok to showcase items, so having a built-in marketplace would make buying and selling much easier, safer, and more organized.

Hi, if your For You feed only shows posts published a long time ago, you can try pulling to refresh first. If it does not work, please try switching between Wi-Fi and mobile data. Also, you can try clearing the app cache and restarting both your App and device to see if it gets fixed. Sorry for any inconvenience caused! Note: Please make sure you're running the latest version of TikTok. You can upgrade to the latest version of the TikTok app via Apple App Store or Google Play. to
